observation.command:
sed -i '221a\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::ConditionalExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  if (auto p = ctx->logicalOrExpression())\
    return self(p);\
\
  auto ret = make<ConditionalOperator>();\
  ret->cond = self(ctx->logicalOrExpression());\
  ret->trueExpr = self(ctx->expression(0));\
  ret->falseExpr = self(ctx->conditionalExpression());\
  return ret;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::LogicalOrExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::LogicalAndExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto ret = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  ret->op = ret->kLOr;\
  ret->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::LogicalAndExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  ret->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::LogicalOrExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return ret;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::LogicalAndExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::InclusiveOrExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto ret = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  ret->op = ret->kLAnd;\
  ret->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::InclusiveOrExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  ret->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::LogicalAndExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return ret;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::InclusiveOrExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::ExclusiveOrExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto ret = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  ret->op = ret->kOr;\
  ret->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::ExclusiveOrExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  ret->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::InclusiveOrExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return ret;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::ExclusiveOrExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::AndExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto ret = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  ret->op = ret->kXor;\
  ret->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::AndExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  ret->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::ExclusiveOrExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return ret;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::AndExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::EqualityExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto ret = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  ret->op = ret->kAnd;\
  ret->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::EqualityExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  ret->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::AndExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return ret;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::EqualityExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::RelationalExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto node = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  auto token = dynamic_cast<antlr4::tree::TerminalNode*>(children[1])->getSymbol()->getType();\
  node->op = (token == ast::EqualEqual) ? node->kEQ : node->kNE;\
  node->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::RelationalExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  node->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::EqualityExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return node;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::RelationalExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::ShiftExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto node = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  auto token = dynamic_cast<antlr4::tree::TerminalNode*>(children[1])->getSymbol()->getType();\
  switch (token) {\
    case ast::Less: node->op = node->kLT; break;\
    case ast::Greater: node->op = node->kGT; break;\
    case ast::LessEqual: node->op = node->kLE; break;\
    case ast::GreaterEqual: node->op = node->kGE; break;\
  }\
  node->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::ShiftExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  node->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::RelationalExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return node;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::ShiftExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::AdditiveExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto node = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  auto token = dynamic_cast<antlr4::tree::TerminalNode*>(children[1])->getSymbol()->getType();\
  node->op = (token == ast::LeftShift) ? node->kShl : node->kShr;\
  node->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::AdditiveExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  node->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::ShiftExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return node;\
}\
\
Expr*\
Ast2Asg::operator()(ast::MultiplicativeExpressionContext* ctx)\
{\
  auto children = ctx->children;\
  if (children.size() == 1)\
    return self(dynamic_cast<ast::UnaryExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
\
  auto node = make<BinaryExpr>();\
  auto token = dynamic_cast<antlr4::tree::TerminalNode*>(children[1])->getSymbol()->getType();\
  switch (token) {\
    case ast::Star: node->op = node->kMul; break;\
    case ast::Div: node->op = node->kDiv; break;\
    case ast::Percent: node->op = node->kRem; break;\
  }\
  node->lft = self(dynamic_cast<ast::UnaryExpressionContext*>(children[0]));\
  node->rht = self(dynamic_cast<ast::MultiplicativeExpressionContext*>(children[2]));\
  return node;\
}
' /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/Ast2Asg.cpp
